channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Bag of old clothes, 26th March
item.description:
Bag of someone’s old clothes dumped on pavement then some one has rifled through to see if there’s Antonine for them to wear

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Linton Close, East Wickham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Huge fly tip, 26th March
item.description:
Huge fly tip involving dozens of bags and other items

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): St Kildas Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street cleaning needed in Chelsfield Lane, 26th March
item.description:
Street cleaning needed in Chelsfield Lane especially just past mini roundabout on Chelsfield Road litter on both sides roadside many thx

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Chelsfield Lane, Ramsden, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Cratered road surface for minimum 20m stretch of road, 26th March
item.description:
Vehicles have been forced to cross onto the opposite side of the carriageway for several weeks now due to appalling road surfacing, level of disrepair is especially dangerous for motorcycle riders. Many unpaved roads are now in better condition!
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 26, Goswell Road, City of London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping on street and lots of bags by the tree, 26th March
item.description:
Bags by tree - looks to be carpet, also rubbish on path way opposite it
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Northwold Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:
Fly tipping and
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Norcott Road, Hackney, London

item.title: Chair and draws abandoned, 26th March
item.description:
A chair and set of draws have been abandoned next to the bike storage opposite the entrance to Symons Close on Kimberly Avenue

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1-27, Symons Close, Nunhead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Waste accumulating, 26th March
item.description:
Waste has not been collected for more than a week now and it is accumulating pausing obvious health hazard

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 39-45, Bermondsey Street, The Borough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Potholes on tyron way, 26th March
item.description:
Multiple pot holes are across the whole road,. They are very deep and the drivers cannot avoid anymore
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 86, Tyron Way, Longlands, Sidcup, Greater London

item.title: Street sign, 26th March
item.description:
Please re-precision the straight sign as it’s filled down and causing an obstacle

item.title: Political Stickers, 26th March
item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): St Georges Road, Beckenham, Greater London

item.description:
1 large square piece of wood left up against the wall at this location.

item.title: Fox dead in the middle of the road, 26th March

item.title: Cardboard Boxes & Rubbish, 26th March
item.description:
Large cardboard boxes filled with smaller boxes and all sorts of rubbish, left on pavement just by Tesco. Been there 2 days, litter spreading out from inside. Cleaned it up, now up against the wall.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 408, Croydon Road, Elmers End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
